description: Add a load-time config-migration path to loadConfigForDir (context.ts:564-581): read the config's schema_version and, on mismatch with the bundled config schema version, walk the schema-name-keyed migration chain for config before validating — mirroring validateBlockWithMigrationForDir (schema-validator.ts:205-242). Add a config migration registry entry and the declarative-transform primitive (map_each) that maps array elements within a migration step.
acceptance_criteria: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
